{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Office Manager",
  "description": "Demmyrayo Ventures is a dynamic, customer-focused business committed to delivering quality products and reliable services across multiple sectors. We operate with integrity, professionalism, and a strong dedication to meeting client needs while creating long-term value for our partners and stakeholders.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Office Manager

Job Locations:&nbsp;Maryland, Lagos and Osun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Serve as the point person for office manager duties including:
	
		Maintenance
		Mailing
		Supplies
		Equipment
		Bills
		Errands
		Shopping
	
	
	Schedule meetings and appointments
	Organize the office layout and order stationery and equipment
	Maintain the office condition and arrange necessary repairs
	Partner with HR to update and maintain office policies as necessary
	Organize office operations and procedures
	Coordinate with IT department on all office equipment
	Ensure that all items are invoiced and paid on time
	Manage contract and price negotiations with office vendors, service providers and office lease
	Manage office G&amp;A budget, ensure accurate and timely reporting
	Provide general support to visitors
	Assist in the onboarding process for new hires
	Address employees queries regarding office management issues (e.g. stationery, Hardware and travel arrangements)
	Liaise with facility management vendors, including cleaning, catering and security services
	Plan in-house or off-site activities, like parties, celebrations and conferences.


Requirements and skills


	High School degree; additional qualification as an Administrative assistant or Secretary will be a plus.
	Proven experience as an Office Manager, Front Office Manager or Administrative Assistant
	Knowledge of Office Administrator responsibilities, systems and procedures
	Proficiency in MS Office (MS Excel and MS Outlook, in particular)
	Hands on experience with office machines (e.g. fax machines and printers)
	Familiarity with email scheduling tools, like Email Scheduler and Boomerang
	Excellent time management skills and ability to multi-task and prioritize work
	Attention to detail and problem solving skills
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Strong organizational and planning skills in a fast-paced environment
	A creative mind with an ability to suggest improvements.


&nbsp;Salary
N180,000 - N220,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to:&nbsp;hrdemmyrayoentltd@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the mail.",

Office Manager Job at Demmyrayo Ventures




        
    

        
        Demmyrayo Ventures is a dynamic, customer-focused business committed to delivering quality products and reliable services across multiple sectors. We operate with integrity, professionalism, and a strong dedication to meeting client needs while creating long-term value for our partners and stakeholders.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Office Manager

Job Locations: Maryland, Lagos and Osun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Serve as the point person for office manager duties including:
	
		Maintenance
		Mailing
		Supplies
		Equipment
		Bills
		Errands
		Shopping
	
	
	Schedule meetings and appointments
	Organize the office layout and order stationery and equipment
	Maintain the office condition and arrange necessary repairs
	Partner with HR to update and maintain office policies as necessary
	Organize office operations and procedures
	Coordinate with IT department on all office equipment
	Ensure that all items are invoiced and paid on time
	Manage contract and price negotiations with office vendors, service providers and office lease
	Manage office G&A budget, ensure accurate and timely reporting
	Provide general support to visitors
	Assist in the onboarding process for new hires
	Address employees queries regarding office management issues (e.g. stationery, Hardware and travel arrangements)
	Liaise with facility management vendors, including cleaning, catering and security services
	Plan in-house or off-site activities, like parties, celebrations and conferences.


Requirements and skills


	High School degree; additional qualification as an Administrative assistant or Secretary will be a plus.
	Proven experience as an Office Manager, Front Office Manager or Administrative Assistant
	Knowledge of Office Administrator responsibilities, systems and procedures
	Proficiency in MS Office (MS Excel and MS Outlook, in particular)
	Hands on experience with office machines (e.g. fax machines and printers)
	Familiarity with email scheduling tools, like Email Scheduler and Boomerang
	Excellent time management skills and ability to multi-task and prioritize work
	Attention to detail and problem solving skills
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Strong organizational and planning skills in a fast-paced environment
	A creative mind with an ability to suggest improvements.


 Salary
N180,000 - N220,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: hrdemmyrayoentltd@gmail.com using the Job Posiiton as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "title": "Finance Officer",
  "description": "Grey Hales Concepts Limited is a professional financial services firm based in Lagos, Nigeria. The company specializes in loan administration, credit management, and financial operations support. With a strong commitment to integrity, efficiency, and customer satisfaction, Grey Hales Concepts Ltd provides structured financial solutions tailored to individuals and businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Keep accurate records for all daily transactions
	Prepare balance sheets
	Process invoices
	Record accounts payable and accounts receivable
	Update internal systems with financial data
	Prepare monthly, quarterly and annual financial reports
	Reconcile bank statements
	Participate in financial audits
	Track bank deposits and payments
	Assist with budget preparation
	Review and implement financial policies.


Requirements and Skills


	BSc Degree in Finance, Accounting or Economics
	Proven work experience as a Finance Officer or similar roles
	Solid knowledge of financial and accounting procedures
	Experience using financial software
	Advanced MS Excel skills
	Knowledge of financial regulations
	Excellent analytical and numerical skills
	Sharp time management skills
	Strong ethics, with an ability to manage confidential data.


Salary
N100,000 - N250,000 monthly.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to the HR via:&nbsp;greyhaleslimited@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Finance Officer Job at Grey Hales Concepts Limited




        
    

        
        Grey Hales Concepts Limited is a professional financial services firm based in Lagos, Nigeria. The company specializes in loan administration, credit management, and financial operations support. With a strong commitment to integrity, efficiency, and customer satisfaction, Grey Hales Concepts Ltd provides structured financial solutions tailored to individuals and businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Officer

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Keep accurate records for all daily transactions
	Prepare balance sheets
	Process invoices
	Record accounts payable and accounts receivable
	Update internal systems with financial data
	Prepare monthly, quarterly and annual financial reports
	Reconcile bank statements
	Participate in financial audits
	Track bank deposits and payments
	Assist with budget preparation
	Review and implement financial policies.


Requirements and Skills


	BSc Degree in Finance, Accounting or Economics
	Proven work experience as a Finance Officer or similar roles
	Solid knowledge of financial and accounting procedures
	Experience using financial software
	Advanced MS Excel skills
	Knowledge of financial regulations
	Excellent analytical and numerical skills
	Sharp time management skills
	Strong ethics, with an ability to manage confidential data.


Salary
N100,000 - N250,000 monthly. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to the HR via: greyhaleslimited@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Videographer / Photographer",
  "description": "At ,Walex Biz Nigeria Limited We Provide powerful web hosting service of all kinds ranging shared hosting, VPS hosting, Email Hosting, Reseller Hosting, Email Hosting and Dedicated Hosting. with high-performance infrastructure and high level security. We are also into all cloud computing applications development including web, mobile applications and cloud technologies. we develop and designed with one question in mind - How does this new technology help people and what problem does it solve?.


Walex Biz also provides Cyber Security technology that increases your agility to stay away from cyber threats and protect you seamlessly. our penetration testing team uses an industry leading methodology to identify hard-to-find vulnerabilities and weaknesses often missed by conventional testing. We offer a variety of services including infrastructure penetration testing, web and mobile application testing, social engineering, red team exercises, source-code reviews and exploit development all to help you protect your most valuable assets - your data and your company.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Videographer / Photographer
Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full Time

Job Description
The Job Requirements for the role include;&nbsp;


	Working closely with the organization to capture photos or videos of people, places and things through the use of creativity and technical abilities in photographic equipments and photo-manipulation software.&nbsp;
	Recommending creative ideas and solutions to achieve desired results and maintaining a professional image.&nbsp;
	Take professional motion pictures or video with eye catching angles. This will require you to capture real time motion pictures of our customers during service hours without making the pictures look &ldquo;staged&rdquo;.&nbsp;
	Edit recorded videos or pictures to tell concise, visually-pleasing stories.&nbsp;


Job Requirements
The Job Requirements for the role include;&nbsp;


	Proven professional shooting experience; preferably in hospitality/lifestyle sector.&nbsp;
	Excellent computer skills with experience in the use of various video editing software programs such as Adobe, Cinema 4D, photoshop, lightroom, Capture One, etc.&nbsp;
	Strong Creative presence and artistic flair.&nbsp;
	Strong focus to over-deliver on quality.&nbsp;
	Interpersonal, Time Management, Communication Skills, Attention to details and multi-tasking.&nbsp;
	Knowledge of production process for online publishing and various printing applications.&nbsp;
	Flexibility as required for the job.&nbsp;


Remuneration


	Negotiable,&nbsp;subject to skills and qualifications.

Videographer / Photographer Job at Walex Biz Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        At ,Walex Biz Nigeria Limited We Provide powerful web hosting service of all kinds ranging shared hosting, VPS hosting, Email Hosting, Reseller Hosting, Email Hosting and Dedicated Hosting. with high-performance infrastructure and high level security. We are also into all cloud computing applications development including web, mobile applications and cloud technologies. we develop and designed with one question in mind - How does this new technology help people and what problem does it solve?.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




Walex Biz also provides Cyber Security technology that increases your agility to stay away from cyber threats and protect you seamlessly. our penetration testing team uses an industry leading methodology to identify hard-to-find vulnerabilities and weaknesses often missed by conventional testing. We offer a variety of services including infrastructure penetration testing, web and mobile application testing, social engineering, red team exercises, source-code reviews and exploit development all to help you protect your most valuable assets - your data and your company.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Videographer / Photographer
Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full Time

Job Description
The Job Requirements for the role include; 


	Working closely with the organization to capture photos or videos of people, places and things through the use of creativity and technical abilities in photographic equipments and photo-manipulation software. 
	Recommending creative ideas and solutions to achieve desired results and maintaining a professional image. 
	Take professional motion pictures or video with eye catching angles. This will require you to capture real time motion pictures of our customers during service hours without making the pictures look “staged”. 
	Edit recorded videos or pictures to tell concise, visually-pleasing stories. 


Job Requirements
The Job Requirements for the role include; 


	Proven professional shooting experience; preferably in hospitality/lifestyle sector. 
	Excellent computer skills with experience in the use of various video editing software programs such as Adobe, Cinema 4D, photoshop, lightroom, Capture One, etc. 
	Strong Creative presence and artistic flair. 
	Strong focus to over-deliver on quality. 
	Interpersonal, Time Management, Communication Skills, Attention to details and multi-tasking. 
	Knowledge of production process for online publishing and various printing applications. 
	Flexibility as required for the job. 


Remuneration


	Negotiable, subject to skills and qualifications.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

TECH Sales & Customer Success Specialist Job at ITM Services Limited




        
    

        
        ITM Services Limited, established as the Nigerian cornerstone of ITM Group, delivers unparalleled expertise in human resource solutions, business process outsourcing, and supply chain management. With strategic offices in Abuja and Lagos, we provide uniquely professional approaches to Human Capital Management that align with business strategies and industry best practices, creating exceptional value through your most vital asset—your people.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Our focus is on helping organizations enhance their performance by equipping them with the right tools and talent to foster growth and remain competitive in today’s dynamic business environment. Through our services, we support businesses in developing their workforce, improving workplace culture, and driving sustainable success. At ITM Nigeria, we take pride in our commitment to excellence, integrity, and client satisfaction. Our reputation for delivering high-value services has earned us the trust of businesses seeking to thrive in Nigeria’s competitive marketplace.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: TECH Sales & Customer Success Specialist 

Job Location: Gaduwa, Abuja 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a Tech Sales & Customer Success Specialist to support the growth of its digital product portfolio while ensuring excellent customer experience and product adoption.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in STEM-related fields or Economics.
	Previous experience in sales, business development, customer success, or sales support, preferably within consultancy, training, or technology-related environments.
	Knowledge of digital platforms and social media tools.
	Experience in sales of Software as a service (SaaS)


Salary
N300,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment.ng@itmafrica.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
